tasks.title: Create Quality Improvement Tasks
tasks.description: Analyze project quality issues and create specific tasks to reach 100% quality for all strikes
tasks.prompt:
Project quality assessment shows issues preventing 100% strike success:

Quality Status:
- Strike 1 (Build): 50%
- Strike 2 (Lint): 95%  
- Strike 3 (Tests): 30%

Issues Found:
- Build Verification: Build command fails
- Lint and Code Quality: 1 ESLint errors found
- Test Coverage and Success: Tests are failing
- Test Coverage and Success: Coverage check failed

TASK: Analyze these quality gaps and create specific improvement tasks to bring ALL strikes to 100% quality. Create tasks for:
1. Build issues (missing dependencies, build failures, configuration)
2. Code quality issues (lint errors, style violations, code standards)
3. Testing issues (failing tests, missing coverage, test setup)

Insert all improvement tasks BEFORE the strike review tasks. Strikes should always remain last in the task list.
success_criteria: All quality issues identified and analyzed
Specific improvement tasks created for each quality gap
Tasks properly prioritized and ordered before strikes
Clear path to 100% quality established

tasks.title: Fix naming-convention violations in core package
tasks.description: Resolve 317 @typescript-eslint/naming-convention violations in packages/core. Update variable names, property names, and constants to follow TypeScript naming standards (camelCase for variables/properties, PascalCase for types/classes, UPPER_CASE for constants).
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/naming-convention violations resolved in core package
Variable names follow camelCase convention
Constants follow UPPER_CASE convention
Type/class names follow PascalCase convention
No new naming convention violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix unbound-method violations in core package
tasks.description: Resolve 88 @typescript-eslint/unbound-method violations in packages/core. Add proper method binding and arrow function usage to prevent unbound method calls that could lose their this context.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/unbound-method violations resolved
Methods properly bound when passed as callbacks
Arrow functions used where appropriate to preserve this context
No new unbound method violations introduced

tasks.title: Fix require-await violations in core package

Unnecessary async keywords removed from functions
Missing await keywords added where needed
Function signatures accurately reflect async behavior
